'''danaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohia|ohia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohia|ohia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| danaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dænæjæth|dænæjæth]] || [[word:dænæjæj|dænæjæj]] || [[word:dænæjæsh|dænæjæsh]] || [[word:dænæjæ|dænæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dananajath|dananajath]] || [[word:dananajaj|dananajaj]] || [[word:dananajash|dananajash]] || [[word:dananaja|dananaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:danajath|danajath]] || [[word:danajaj|danajaj]] || [[word:danajash|danajash]] || [[word:danaja|danaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:danafjath|danafjath]] || [[word:danafjaj|danafjaj]] || [[word:danafjash|danafjash]] || [[word:danafjaf|danafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:danajatha|danajatha]] || [[word:danajaja|danajaja]] || [[word:danajasha|danajasha]] || [[word:danajaka|danajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:danajath|danajath]] || [[word:danajaj|danajaj]] || [[word:danajash|danajash]] || [[word:danaja|danaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:danajathal|danajathal]] || [[word:danajajal|danajajal]] || [[word:danajashal|danajashal]] || [[word:danajakal|danajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:danajathatha|danajathatha]] || [[word:danajajaja|danajajaja]] || [[word:danajashasha|danajashasha]] || [[word:danajaka|danajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:danajathan|danajathan]] || [[word:danajajan|danajajan]] || [[word:danajashan|danajashan]] || [[word:danajakan|danajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:danajathaoro|danajathaoro]] || [[word:danajajaoro|danajajaoro]] || [[word:danajashaoro|danajashaoro]] || [[word:danajakaoro|danajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
